case_title: ALIENSUN LABS LLC VS. GREEN IDEAS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ALIENSUN LABS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN IDEAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-30-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-30-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-30-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE ON THE CROSS-COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT GREEN IDEAS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT ALIENSUN LABS LLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

(SC-222) ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS [X] THE REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENST IS APPROVED, AND THE COURT ORDERS: [X] PAYMENTS OF $520.33, ON THE 15 DAY OF EACH MONTH STARTING DEC-15-2016. UNTIL DEC-15-2017. AMOUNT OF FINAL PAYMENT $520.33.[X] THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF PAYMENS IS $6250.00 WHICH INCLUDES INTEREST ON THE UNPAID BALANCE OF THE JUDGMENT. THE ACTUAL AMOUNT OF THAT INTEREST MAY CHANGE IF THE PAYMENTS ARE MADE LATE OR EARLY.
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF ALIENSUN LABS LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-30-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-30-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE ON THE CROSS-COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
(SC-221) RESPONSE TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALIENSUN LABS LLC
(SC-225 ) ORDER ON DECLARATION OF DEFAULT IN PAYMENTS: THE PAYMENTS ORDER REFFERRED TO [X] IS TERMINATED AND THE BALANCE OF THE JUDGMENT IS COLLECTIBLE.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN IDEAS
